evidence: run_009 has 98 winners and zero realized losses, but worst MAE is -638.75, average MAE is about -106, exposure is 35.6 hours, and worst tails took 80-188 minutes to recover. Trade-health signals were logged as zero in the current run, so enabling the module is a direct validation of whether the switch is currently inert or genuinely protective.
name: Runtime Health Tail Containment
risk: The module may convert recoverable no-stop winners into premature realized losses or reduce net profit without improving score; reject on any meaningful profit suppression or realized-loss creation.
trigger: Open long trade develops stale/poor health characteristics after entry rather than being filtered pre-entry.
validation_metric: Risk-adjusted score improves with net profit >=98% of run_001, pnl_per_exposure_hour flat or better, no material trade starvation, and worst MAE improving toward <= -527 without realized-loss proliferation.
